Description

Swagger UI Generator

Lightweight HTTP header value types and parsing utilities.

HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.classic
Predefined HTTP headers, parts, entities, resources, and responses built on the classic Apache HttpComponents API.

HTTP Header Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.header
Next-generation HTTP header implementations.

  • Uses of MediaType in org.apache.juneau.commons.http

    Subclasses of MediaType in org.apache.juneau.commons.http
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MediaRange
    Describes a single type used in content negotiation between an HTTP client and server, as described in Section 14.1 and 14.7 of RFC2616 (the HTTP/1.1 specification).
    Fields in org.apache.juneau.commons.http declared as MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.CSV
    Reusable predefined media type
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.EMPTY
    Represents an empty media type object.
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.HTML
    Reusable predefined media type
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.JSON
    Reusable predefined media type
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.MSGPACK
    Reusable predefined media type for MessagePack binary format
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.N3
    Reusable predefined media type for N3 (Notation3) RDF format
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.NTRIPLE
    Reusable predefined media type for N-Triple RDF format
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.PLAIN
    Reusable predefined media type for plain text
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.RDF
    Reusable predefined media type for RDF XML
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.RDFABBREV
    Reusable predefined media type for RDF XML with abbreviations
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.TURTLE
    Reusable predefined media type for Turtle RDF format
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.UON
    Reusable predefined media type for UON (URL-Encoding Object Notation)
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.URLENCODING
    Reusable predefined media type for URL-encoded form data
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.XML
    Reusable predefined media type for XML
    static final MediaType
    MediaType.XMLSOAP
    Reusable predefined media type for SOAP XML
    static final MediaType

    Reusable predefined media type for YAML
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.http that return MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MediaType
    MediaType.forEachParameter(Consumer<NameValuePair> action)
    Performs an action on the additional parameters on this media type.
    final MediaType
    MediaType.forEachSubType(Consumer<String> action)
    Performs an action on the subtypes broken down by fragments delimited by "'".
    static MediaType
    MediaType.of(String value)
    Returns the media type for the specified string.
    static MediaType
    MediaType.of(String value, NameValuePair... parameters)
    Same as of(String) but allows you to specify the parameters.
    static MediaType[]
    MediaType.ofAll(String... values)
    Same as of(String) but allows you to construct an array of MediaTypes from an array of strings.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.http with parameters of type MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final int
    MediaType.compareTo(MediaType o)
     
    final int
    MediaType.match(MediaType o, boolean allowExtraSubTypes)
    Returns a match metric against the specified media type where a larger number represents a better match.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.commons.http with type arguments of type MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    MediaRanges.match(List<? extends MediaType> mediaTypes)
    Given a list of media types, returns the best match for this Accept header.
    int
    MediaType.match(List<MediaType> mediaTypes)
    Given a list of media types, returns the best match for this Content-Type header.

    MarshallingSession.Builder.mediaTypeDefault(MediaType value)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MediaType
    ParserMatch.getMediaType()
    Returns the media type of the parser that matched the HTTP Content-Type header value.
    final MediaType
    Parser.getPrimaryMediaType()
    Returns the first media type handled based on the values passed to the consumes constructor parameter.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser that return types with arguments of type MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final List<MediaType>
    Parser.getMediaTypes()
    Returns the media types handled based on the values passed to the consumes constructor parameter.
    List<MediaType>
    ParserSet.getSupportedMediaTypes()
    Returns the media types that all parsers in this group can handle
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser with parameters of type MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Parser>
    ParserSet.getParser(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as ParserSet.getParserMatch(MediaType) but returns just the matched parser.
    Optional<ParserMatch>
    ParserSet.getParserMatch(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as ParserSet.getParserMatch(String) but matches using a MediaType instance.

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer that return MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MediaType
    SerializerMatch.getMediaType()
    Returns the media type of the serializers that matched the HTTP Accept header value.
    final MediaType
    Serializer.getPrimaryMediaType()
    Returns the first entry in the accept parameter passed into the constructor.
    final MediaType
    Serializer.getResponseContentType()
    Optional method that returns the response Content-Type for this serializer if it is different from the matched media type.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer that return types with arguments of type MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<MediaType>
    SerializerSet.getSupportedMediaTypes()
    Returns the media types that all serializers in this group can handle.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer with parameters of type MediaType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Serializer>
    SerializerSet.getSerializer(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializerMatch(MediaType) but returns just the matched serializer.
    Optional<SerializerMatch>
    SerializerSet.getSerializerMatch(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializerMatch(String) but matches using a MediaType instance.
    Optional<OutputStreamSerializer>
    SerializerSet.getStreamSerializer(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializer(MediaType), but casts it to a OutputStreamSerializer.
    Optional<WriterSerializer>
    SerializerSet.getWriterSerializer(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializer(MediaType), but casts it to a WriterSerializer.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final Serializer
    Serializer.forEachAcceptMediaType(Consumer<MediaType> action)

    Method
    Description

    Returns the explicit list of supported content types for this resource.

    RestContext.getProduces()
    Returns the explicit list of supported accept types for this resource.
